news_items.headline: Goldman Sachs rates Nvidia a strong buy with $250 price target ahead of Q1 earnings; stock trading below historical valuations despite AI market dominance

Kakao announces OpenAI partnership as part of Stargate AI expansion initiative, positioning company for AI growth
Shinhan Sol Shipbuilding Top3 Plus ETF shows 154% annual return but faces near-term weakness with strong sell signals; portfolio tracks HD Hyundai, Samsung Heavy Industries, Hanwha Ocean
